title: Assistant Manager – Tax
metaDescription: Assistant Manager – Tax role in Singapore: manage corporate and individual tax compliance, advise on planning and incentives, and review associates' work.
description: Join our rapidly expanding team. We are looking for an experienced Assistant Manager to join our Tax Team in Singapore.
duties: Manage corporate and individual tax compliance for a portfolio of clients.
Prepare and review tax computations and returns for timely submission.
Advise clients on tax planning, incentives, and cross-border tax matters.
Liaise with the tax authorities on queries, audits, and objections.
Supervise and review the work of tax associates.
requirements: Degree in Accountancy, Finance, or an accredited tax qualification.
4 – 5 years of relevant tax experience, preferably in a professional firm.
Strong knowledge of corporate tax and GST regulations.
Analytical, detail-oriented, and able to manage deadlines.
remuneration: Remuneration will be commensurate with qualifications and experience.
